creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Tue, Nov 07, 2000 at 03:10:05AM -0800, Bruce Evans wrote:
>  This output made it easy to reproduce the bug in a simpler way:
>  
>      $ cd /tmp
>      $ mkdir z
>      $ cd z
>      $ chmod 0 /tmp/z
>      $ make
>      Segmentation fault

Eek!  Shoo, bug!  Shoo!
